data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: The design is optimized for mouse and touch interaction, making interactive elements accessible.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates larger clickable areas and closer targets.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduces decision time by limiting menu options and simplifying navigation.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns user interface patterns with user expectations from other web experiences.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Information is chunked into digestible pieces to avoid overwhelming users.
data.technical_spec: Deploys bullet points and succinct key information.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A modern and visually appealing design which promotes a positive user experience.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design with high-quality visual assets.
